Women Infants & Children (WIC)
Welcome to WIC!
WIC is a special supplemental nutrition program that provides no-cost services to women, infants, and children. The Del Norte County WIC Program serves low to medium income families living in California, including families who are pregnant, breastfeeding, who just had a baby (or pregnancy loss), or have children under 5 years old. Newly pregnant individuals, working, military and migrant families may also qualify for the WIC program.
WIC services include:
Monthly food benefits for purchasing healthy foods
Nutrition education and information for a child's stage of growth, including for pregnancy and postpartum individuals.
Breastfeeding and Chestfeeding support
Special benefit to be used at the farmer's market in the summer
Referrals to other community and healthcare resources
Find out if you are
eligible for WIC services
.
